App: Dimpact e2e test
Test Environment: Test

Feature:Login 5

Scenario:
Bob wants to login to ZAC
3

Given "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/" 2s 344ms

When "Bob" logs in 734ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Dashboard" 1s 809ms

Scenario:
Bob wants to log out of the application after being logged in
4

Given "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/" 1s 744ms

When "Bob" clicks on element with accessibility label: "Gebruikers profiel" 425ms

When "Bob" clicks on element with text: "Uitloggen" 755ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Sign in to your account" 19ms

Scenario:
Bob logs back in
4

Given "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/" 1s 729ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Sign in to your account" 28ms

When "Bob" logs in 614ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Dashboard" 1s 803ms

Scenario:
Bob wants to log out of the application after being logged in
4

Given "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/" 1s 653ms

When "Bob" clicks on element with accessibility label: "Gebruikers profiel" 380ms

When "Bob" clicks on element with text: "Uitloggen" 863ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Sign in to your account" 20ms

Scenario:
Bob logs back in
4

Given "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/" 1s 753ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Sign in to your account" 26ms

When "Bob" logs in 608ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Dashboard" 1s 813ms

Screenshot

And "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/zaken/werkvoorraad" < 1ms

And the page is done searching < 1ms

And there are at least 3 zaken < 1ms

When "Bob" selects that number of zaken < 1ms

And "Bob" distributes the zaken to the first group available < 1ms

Then "Bob" gets a message confirming that the distribution of zaken is starting < 1ms

And after a while the snackbar disappears < 1ms

Bob releases zaken

And "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/zaken/werkvoorraad" < 1ms

Feature:Taken verdelen / vrijgeven 2

Scenario:
Bob distributes taken to a group
7

Given "Bob" is logged in to zac 2s 300ms

And "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/taken/werkvoorraad" 1s 244ms

And the page is done searching 4s 579ms

And there are at least 3 taken 20ms

When "Bob" selects that number of taken 198ms

And "Bob" distributes the taken to the first group available 757ms

Then "Bob" gets a message confirming that the distribution of taken is complete 1s 865ms

Scenario:
Bob releases taken
7

Given "Bob" is logged in to zac 2s 223ms

And "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/taken/werkvoorraad" 957ms

And the page is done searching 4s 504ms

And there are at least 3 taken 20ms

When "Bob" selects that number of taken 205ms

And "Bob" releases the taken 376ms

Then "Bob" gets a message confirming that the releasement of taken is complete 1s 357ms
